subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who speaketh is His Most Great Sign amidst all created things and His Manifestation unto those in the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لایه الکبری بین الوری و ظهور الله لمن فی السموات
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @station of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
